10.evidenceText: No price information found in either source. Source 1 discusses product features and Eurobike Award. Source 2 lists product specifications (Set of 2, 40mm tubeless valve) but no pricing data.
10.extractionRationale: Searched both provided sources for retail price data. The bike-discount.de source contains product description and features only. The bike24.com source contains product specifications and features but no price information was included in the provided content excerpts.

27.evidenceText: Four sources provided: (1) https://www.bike24.de/p1993547.html - CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 black; (2) https://www.bike24.de/p1993551.html - CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166; (3) https://www.bike24.de/p1993581.html - CoreCap BTI-165 Ventilkern (valve core accessory, excluded); (4) https://www.bike24.de/p1993549.html - CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 copper
27.extractionRationale: Counted distinct product page URLs for CoreCap valves (main products, not accessories). Excluded Source 3 (BTI-165 Ventilkern valve core) as it is an accessory component. Three unique URLs identified for CoreCap AL Valve products.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - copper | 2 Pieces | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: Product listing content does not contain any stock status indicators such as 'out of stock', 'currently unavailable', 'nicht verfügbar', 'ausverkauft', or similar terminology.
30.extractionRationale: The provided content from the product page shows the product description and features but does not include any stock availability information. Stock status cannot be determined from the available text.

56.evidenceText: Sources provide information about Clik Valve products themselves (valves, valve parts) but do not contain a list of distinct inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface.
56.extractionRationale: The provided evidence discusses Clik Valve technology, valve variants (tubeless in 60mm and 80mm), and pump head adapters, but does not identify any specific Schwalbe inner tube products that use the Clik valve interface. No inner tube models or SKUs are mentioned in any of the five sources.

61.sourceTitle: LME Aluminium Alloy | London Metal Exchange
61.extractionRationale: Extracted 3325.00 from LME official source, but this is for Aluminium Alloy (not pure aluminium spot) and source provided is not the primary LME Aluminium spot price page. Low confidence due to potential product mismatch.
